tool_args.label: Concept 1: Offset Bus Lanes
tool_args.raw_text: Concept 1 Offset Bus Lanes - Offset bus lanes (one lane away from the curb) - SBS Bus Bulb Station - Local Bus Stop - Parking - Median pedestrian refuge

payload.description: Offset bus lanes (one lane away from the curb) with SBS bus bulb stations, local bus stops, parking, and median pedestrian refuge. Primarily uses existing roadway geometry. Neckdowns and widened medians at station locations. Consistent 3 lanes of traffic.
payload.location_text: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard corridor, Queens

normalized_location.raw_text: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard corridor, Queens

evidence_refs.source_quote: Concept 1 Offset Bus Lanes
Offset bus lanes (one lane away from the curb)

tool_args.label: Concept 2: Main Road Bus Lanes
tool_args.raw_text: Concept 2 Main Road Bus Lanes - Curbside bus lanes in the mainline roadway - Calmed service roads with parking - SBS stations and Local bus stops on side median - Shortened crossing distance with pedestrian refuges - Separates local and thru traffic

payload.description: Main road curbside bus lanes with calmed service roads for local access and parking, SBS stations and local bus stops on expanded median, shortened crossing distances with pedestrian refuges, separates local and thru traffic. 3 lanes total (1 lane in service road and 2 lanes in main road).

normalized_location.raw_text: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard corridor, Queens

evidence_refs.source_quote: Concept 2 Main Road Bus Lanes

tool_args.label: Concept 3: Median Busway

payload.description: Median busway with passing lane, median stations for SBS and local buses, separated northbound and southbound roadways, center median provides pedestrian refuge, rush hour parking restrictions on Cross Bay Blvd/station locations, left-turn only signal required to cross busway.

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Local, limited, and express bus services • Wide roadway with changing widths and configurations • Pedestrian and vehicle safety • Complex intersections • Congestion and traffic flow • Resiliency / future growth

tool_args.label: Existing conditions on corridor
tool_args.raw_text: Bus stops lack amenities - All lanes are mixed traffic; lack of organization - Long pedestrian crossing distance with no refuge - Left turns create congestion and safety issues - Wide roadway encourages speeding

payload.claim_text: Existing conditions: Bus stops lack amenities; All lanes are mixed traffic/lack of organization; Long pedestrian crossing distance with no refuge; Left turns create congestion and safety issues; Wide roadway encourages speeding
payload.subject: Woodhaven/Cross Bay corridor existing conditions

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus stops lack amenities
All lanes are mixed traffic; lack of organization
Long pedestrian crossing distance with no refuge
Left turns create congestion and safety issues
Wide roadway encourages speeding
